function_search_description: Translate text from one language to another. Supports over 100 languages with high-quality neural machine translation. Can handle both short phrases and long paragraphs.

text.description: The text content to translate. Can be a single word, sentence, or multiple paragraphs. Maximum 5000 characters per request.

source_language.description: The source language code (ISO 639-1). If not specified, the language will be auto-detected.

target_language.description: The target language code (ISO 639-1) to translate the text into.

formality.description: The formality level of the translation. Not all language pairs support formality settings.
